input_contract.reason: DySPN epoch78 was trained with RGB in [0,1], not ImageNet-normalized RGB.

deployment_goal: maximize board-pass RHB subgraphs while preserving exact Host fallback for risky glue and model-owned preprocessing contracts
notes: Run profile-source first to identify high-risk operators in the reference code.
Run score-onnx-dir if probe/exported ONNX files already exist.
Use optimize-onnx --export-submodels for each candidate full/subgraph ONNX.
Only promote rules after board pass; CModel pass alone is not sufficient.
Do not use pre-rgbfix DySPN visualizations for accuracy analysis; they used the wrong RGB contract.
